dict.string: This app requires access to your camera so you can take photos of properties or vehicles directly within the app.
Face ID is used to securely authenticate your account and protect access to your personal information.

Enma Mobile uses your location to show properties and vehicles near you on the map and to sort search results by distance. For example, when you search for rentals, we display listings ordered by how close they are to your current position. With "Always" permission, we can also update nearby listings when the app is in the background.

Enma Mobile may use your location in the background to keep nearby property and vehicle listings up to date. For example, when you reopen the app after moving to a new area, we can show you relevant listings without you having to search again.

Enma Mobile uses your location to show properties and vehicles near you on the map and to sort search results by distance. For example, when you search for rentals, we display listings ordered by how close they are to your current position.
This app requires access to your photo library so you can upload property or vehicle images to your listings.
